creator: piotr.smyrak@heron.pl
text:
The attached shar introduces a port skeleton of Contacts, a lightweight
efficient contacts manager based on GNOME's Evolution Data Server.

Fix: I hope the web form won't mangle the shar. If so, then I am placing it here as well: http://smyru.petronet.pl/freebsd/contacts-0.1.shar
How-To-Repeat: N/A
